attempt_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Minor reproducibility/documentation issues: workbook formulas could not be programmatically inspected in this environment (openpyxl unavailable to preview the .xlsx) so preserved/formula visibility could not be independently verified. The deliverable reports values rounded to 1 decimal place but the rubric requires numeric computations to at least 3 decimal places and explicit rounding rules; this omission reduces reproducibility and strict compliance.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Ensure the workbook preserves visible formulas (not only computed values) and document rounding rules (compute and show values to at least 3 decimal places, state rounding policy). Embed per-row formula references or notes linking each computed cell to the embedded-packet field used. Re-run with spreadsheet file previewable or include an accompanying script that reproduces all workbook calculations with preserved formulas.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Required artifacts (workbook and memo) were produced and the memo documents inputs, assumptions, intermediate calculations, sensitivity checks, remediation combinations, and a prioritized recommendation. Numerical margin calculation uses margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score, classifications follow the specified bands, sensitivity +/-5% was applied and no records changed classification, and remediation combination O1+O2 (cost=19,500) is correctly identified as the only budget-compliant option that yields PASS for the failing record when remediation reductions are modeled multiplicatively. Deterministic artifact precheck passed.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: Required artifacts (workbook and memo) were produced and the memo documents inputs, assumptions, intermediate calculations, sensitivity checks, remediation combinations, and a prioritized recommendation. Numerical margin calculation uses margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score, classifications follow the specified bands, sensitivity +/-5% was applied and no records changed classification, and remediation combination O1+O2 (cost=19,500) is correctly identified as the only budget-compliant option that yields PASS for the failing record when remediation reductions are modeled multiplicatively. Deterministic artifact precheck passed.

attempt_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.

rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include explicit, workbook-visible formulas or comment rows that show the remediation effect math per record (e.g., show how each option's percent reductions apply to each record) and map remediation controls to concrete IdP product configuration keys to remove the remaining needs_review items.
rubric_item_scores.notes: Required artifacts present and validated (workbook and memo). Memo documents per-record observed_risk_score, margins computed as normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score (e.g. R1 62.5-41.7=20.8; R3 62.5-78.6=-16.1), classification mapping matches rubric (negative -> FAIL, 0-3.125 -> WARN, >3.125 -> PASS), 5% sensitivity checks performed and expert-review flags set where classifications change, remediation combination math shown with costs and budget checks and a clear recommended option (O1+O2). Ambiguous inferences (observed_risk_score derivation and remediation effect semantics) are explicitly marked needs_review in the memo, satisfying the rubric requirement to flag rather than fabricate.
